nodes.name: Kel's Hi-res Hlaalu
nodes.summary: This "mod" replaces all hlaalu textures (i.e Balmora) with new high resolution ones.My goal was to provide sharper, more detailed textures, whilst preserving Bethesda'soriginal design as much as possible.I hope you enjoy them!

nodes.name: Bouking Manor 1.2
nodes.summary: This mod puts a Redoran style Manor just outside of the South Gate of Caldera. (Right across from Kallio.) The Manor has a Great Room, Armory, Storage Room, Master Suite, Kitchen and Dining area.Armor mannequins are made with Better Bodies

nodes.name: Bow of Eternity
nodes.summary: A powerful and evil Bow was lost on the grounds of Nimawia Grotto.There were many heroes owning that artifact but all died under mysterious circumstances,now the Bow is looking for you !!!What can you do with the Bow ?- Press the Sneak-Key

nodes.name: Caldera Estate
nodes.summary: A quaint cottage style estate just outside Caldera. It has entrance room with stairsleading up to the landing and master bedroom, armory, library and an enchantment andalchemy lab in the basement, with plenty of storage space throughout.

nodes.name: Castle Unreal
nodes.summary: The castle is located on one of the most southern parts of Vvardenfel, a little bit east from Vivec's Palace. Best to go there from Vivec Arena, exit over the bridge to the east and follow the path on the islands to the south, past Omani

nodes.name: Chapels of Vvardenfell 2.0
nodes.summary: This mod add's an Imperial Chapel to the following Villages:-Caldera.-Pelagiad. (The priest can be found at the excisting ImperialAltar)-Seyda Neen.-Dagon Fel.-Wolverine Hall. (far east of Wolverine Hall)What you can do...-General: You can

nodes.name: Black Rose and Cedric
nodes.summary: 1. What this mod is:    This is a quest, featuring two people, who live in a pretty house just south of Seyda Neen. Talk to the townspeople to learn more about Cedric and Black Rose. When you find the house, Black Rose has a quest for you

nodes.name: Balmora Thief Hideout
nodes.summary: Thief hide out 1.0 by Trebor, sandra.bacon1@ntlworld.comIn the south wall corner club places a trapdoor behind the bar on the lower level, contains alchemy equipment, re locking chest for practice, plenty of storage and a place to sleep,

nodes.name: Balmora Corner House
nodes.summary: The house doesn't feel big although it has lots of storage. The bedroom is pretty red, so it kinda makes you think of a whorehouse. But i haven't added any NPC's for you pleasure. you can also acces the roof for a view while standing under

nodes.name: Balmora Fighters Guild Room
nodes.summary: Changes:Removed bunk beds, static crates, original chests.Added bed, bedside table, candle, rug, floor candle lamp, table, and 3 chests. The chests and closet each have an encumbrance of 300. The bedside table's encumbrance is 25.The bed,

nodes.name: Abandoned Flat 2.1
nodes.summary: Adds a player home outside Vivec. Features training dummies, alchemy storage, the works. And maybe a few broken quests.

nodes.name: Vivec Cottage
nodes.summary: The cottage is simply furnished, a main room with a fireplace and a bedroom. Beneath the cottage is a damp, moody underground\water Velothi ruin. I'm not sure why it's there or what it was. More storage and another bed. And

nodes.name: Birds by Cait and Leeloo
nodes.summary: Birds by Cait and Leeloo, :>This is Cait's wonderful and adorable birdies with their new animations that I've just added to various locations in bloodmoon, morrowind and tribunal.

nodes.name: Chainy's Auriel's Shield Replacer
nodes.summary: This is a pluginless mesh, texture and icon replacer for the vanilla Auriel's Shield. Brand new mesh and 2048x2048 shield textures created by InsanitySorrow, mesh painstakingly tweaked by Chainy to work in Morrowind with minimal clipping.

nodes.name: Grave Goods
nodes.summary: Small plugin that changes loot tables of urns in Ancestral Tombs
